steps.title: Locate the matching angle
steps.content: Triangle $RST$ is similar to triangle $UVW$, and $T$ corresponds to $W$. Therefore $\tan W=\tan T$.

steps.title: Identify the legs
steps.content: Since $480^2+140^2=500^2$, side $TR$ is the hypotenuse and the right angle is at $S$. For angle $T$, the opposite leg is $RS=480$ and the adjacent leg is $ST=140$.

steps.title: Compute the tangent
steps.content:
Use opposite over adjacent.
$$\tan W=\tan T=\frac{480}{140}=\frac{24}{7}$$
The answer is D.
